MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,689.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT RISSIEN, CARL SPILLANE, MARYANNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RISSIEN, CARL SPILLANE, MARYANNE $1,916.04 PRINCIPAL, $1,177.52 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,093.56

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION - DEPT. OF HUMAN SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RISSIEN, CARL SPILLANE, MARYANNE $2,689.00 PRINCIPAL, $31.37 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,720.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ORDER ON PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT.THE REQUEST TO SET ASIDE TERMS IS GRANTED. -JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE -
